archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy / Trust) with Swiss Minimalist Layouts
design_philosophy: A premium, authoritative financial services platform. Blends the high-end, old-money trust of organic light browns and navy blues with the high-tech precision of a quantitative hedge fund (inspired by Two Sigma). Uses generous whitespace, sharp typography, and deliberate monospace accents to communicate 'Financial Science'.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#0A192F]
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#0A192F]
rules.science_accent: font-mono text-[#003B5C] bg-[#F1F5F9] px-2 py-1 rounded border border-[#E2E8F0]

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32)
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: The 'Control Room' grid for dashboards, 'Bento' grid for features/solutions
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px) to maintain a sharp, authoritative institutional feel

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E2E8F0]/50 shadow-sm
surface_strategies.cards: Flat Solid: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
surface_strategies.footer: Dark Theme inversion: bg-[#0A192F] text-white py-24
surface_strategies.buttons: Sharp corners, flat colors. Primary: bg-[#003B5C] text-white hover:bg-[#002A42]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#003B5C] text-[#003B5C] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9].

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1). Text links underline on hover. Buttons maintain sharp transitions (duration-200 ease-out).
motion_and_interactions.page_scroll: Smooth scrolling (Lenis recommended if possible, otherwise CSS scroll-behavior: smooth).
motion_and_interactions.hero_animation: Typewriter or scramble effect on the word 'Science' in the hero header. Fade up entrance for surrounding text.

landing_page.hero: Headline: 'Wealthwolffs understands the Financial [Science]'. The word 'Science' must use the `science_accent` mono typography (like Two Sigma). Background: Clean white with subtle #F9F8F6 geometric or architectural accents. Minimalist and high-end.
landing_page.about_us: Includes a Shadcn NavigationMenu dropdown in the header (Who are we, Why Wealthwolffs, Founder, Careers, Media/News). On the page, a clean split-layout section.
landing_page.solutions: Scrollable service cards displaying 9 financial services. Minimalist stats layout (inspired by faralloncapital/greenhedgecapital). Use CSS snap-x or a carousel.
landing_page.products: Sections for WolffsInstaAlerts and WolffsInstaTrade. Use 'Bento' grid layouts to showcase features.
landing_page.wolffs_academy: A 'Coming Soon' section. Style it with a subtle glassmorphism overlay or a lock icon, maintaining the premium feel.
landing_page.testimonials: Clean, authoritative quote cards. Serif accent font (Playfair Display) for the quote marks to add an 'old money' touch.
landing_page.contact_us: Shadcn UI forms. Sharp, flat input fields. Minimalist.
landing_page.auth: Login/Signup page with Google OAuth button. Split screen with a premium architectural image on one side.

admin_panel.layout: Sidebar navigation + main content area. High-density 'Control Room' grid.
admin_panel.styling: Cardless or subtle borders. Very dense and functional. Tables for user management and enquiries (using Shadcn Table).

components_usage.tables: Shadcn Table, border-collapse, dense padding for Admin.
components_usage.dropdowns: Shadcn NavigationMenu for Header, Shadcn DropdownMenu for Actions.
components_usage.carousel: Framer Motion or native CSS scroll snap for Solutions.
components_usage.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea, Label. Flat borders.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Navy on White/Off-White.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='login-google-button').

image_urls.description: Brand Logo (Gold/blue shield with eagles on dark navy background)
London financial district modern architecture (Use for auth split screen or subtle hero visual)
Low angle view of iconic skyscrapers under blue sky
Business professionals discussing documents in a modern meeting room (Use for About Us / Careers)

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for marketing sections to ensure creative layouts, but rely heavily on Shadcn UI for interactive elements (forms, dropdowns, tables).
CRITICAL: The word 'Science' in the hero MUST be styled as code (monospace, distinct color/background) to emulate the Two Sigma text effect requested by the user.
For the Solutions section, build a horizontally scrollable container or carousel for the 9 financial services, using a minimalist card design with subtle hover lifts.
Build the Admin Dashboard with strict, dense 'Control Room' grid rules (no heavy shadows, use sharp 1px borders).
Install and use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for body, and 'IBM Plex Mono' for code snippets.
Ensure the color palette perfectly matches the user's request: White background, Aesthetic Blue (#003B5C), and Aesthetic Light Brown (#C4A47C).
